name: Sharplink, Inc.
summary: Overview Sharplink undertook a significant strategic shift in June 2025 in our business operations by becoming one of the worlds largest publicly traded companies to adopt Ether (ETH), the native token of the Ethereum blockchain, as its primary treasury asset. This strategy reflects the Companys commitment to align our corporate treasury with the future of programmable finance, digital capital markets and decentralized infrastructure.
